name: clawsig-protocol-v0.2
description: Clawsig Protocol v0.2 roadmap. All CPL-V2-001..005 stories are shipped on main.

userStories.title: Protocol-level rate limiting semantics
userStories.description: Define how proof bundles express and verify rate limits — per-agent, per-model, per-tool. Allows verifiers to detect burst abuse without online state.
acceptanceCriteria: Rate limit claims in proof bundle metadata
Verifier checks claim consistency across bundles from same agent
Conformance vectors for rate limit violations
userStories.notes: Shipped via PR #285 (merge 1b21d0cdb562e02347304451cc6edd137a5b99d2): proof_bundle rate_limit_claims schema, deterministic proof/aggregate verifier checks, reason-code wiring, and executable conformance vectors.

userStories.title: Multi-party receipt co-signing
userStories.description: Allow receipts to carry multiple signatures — agent + proxy + human approver. Enables multi-party attestation without central trust.
acceptanceCriteria: Co-signature schema extension (additive, backward compatible)
Verifier validates all co-signatures
Threshold semantics (e.g., 2-of-3 required)
userStories.notes: Shipped via R48 verifier + conformance lanes. Refs: PR #281 (merge a936c099814802df68e810d974d03017f39fd497), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Receipt expiry / TTL semantics
userStories.description: Define how proof bundles and individual receipts express validity windows. Verifiers reject expired receipts.
acceptanceCriteria: TTL field in receipt envelope schema (optional)
Verifier enforces TTL when present
Grace period semantics for clock skew
userStories.notes: Shipped via R49 temporal guardrails and verifier/runtime uptake. Refs: PR #282 (merge 4199b2b80ea5e1993e9063b8408dd81b90757e74), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Selective disclosure for tool receipt arguments
userStories.description: Allow tool receipts to optionally reveal specific argument fields while keeping others hashed. Uses structured commitment schemes.
acceptanceCriteria: Selective disclosure schema (per-field reveal/hash)
Verifier validates partial disclosure against digest
Privacy-preserving: default remains hash-only
userStories.notes: Shipped via selective-disclosure schema/runtime + executable fixtures. Refs: PR #281 (merge a936c099814802df68e810d974d03017f39fd497), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Aggregate proof bundles (bundle-of-bundles)
userStories.description: Define a composition format for fleet-level verification — a single signed envelope containing multiple proof bundles from different agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate bundle schema with member bundle references
Verifier validates aggregate signature + each member
Fleet summary statistics in aggregate metadata
userStories.notes: Shipped via aggregate verifier/runtime + executable aggregate vectors. Refs: PR #282 (merge 4199b2b80ea5e1993e9063b8408dd81b90757e74), PR #283 (merge 7c81b6c45cf1a59fbcf157e99940ce4c09ffa4c5).

userStories.title: Additive causal binding schema contract
userStories.description: Add optional causal linkage fields to receipt binding schema with legacy-compatible behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional span_id/parent_span_id/tool_span_id/phase/attribution_confidence fields to receipt_binding.v1 schema
No breaking changes for legacy bundles (fields remain optional)
Schema/runtime sync checks remain green
userStories.notes: Shipped via CAV-US-001/002 vertical-slice lane: additive receipt_binding causal fields accepted with legacy-safe optional semantics; verifier/runtime schema sync + conformance checks updated. Refs: decision freeze PR #304 (merge 84ce196cc8e8bcbb126503e681f453bc758b5edb) + CAV-US-001/002 implementation lane.

userStories.title: Fail-closed causal DAG verifier checks
userStories.description: Enforce deterministic causal linkage integrity when causal fields are present.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject dangling parent/tool span references with deterministic reason code
Reject cyclic parent-span graphs with deterministic reason code
Reject out-of-range attribution confidence values while preserving legacy bundle validity when fields are absent
userStories.notes: Shipped via D2 vertical slice: fail-closed causal checks for dangling references, parent-span cycles, and attribution confidence bounds with deterministic reason codes + firewall conformance vectors.

userStories.title: Runtime tool-span emission wiring
userStories.description: Emit deterministic span linkage fields from runtime wrappers without post-sign payload mutation.
acceptanceCriteria: Runtime emits causal span fields in receipt bindings
Signature sequencing remains deterministic (stitch before sign, no post-sign mutation)
Concurrent tool windows produce deterministic attribution fallback markers
userStories.notes: Shipped via runtime wiring lane on feat/clawsig-sdk/CAV-US-003-runtime-causal-emission: deterministic span linkage fields are now emitted in SDK/runtime receipt bindings (tool/side-effect/human-approval + Causal Sieve outputs), wrap signature sequencing is resealed after all payload mutation, and concurrent tool windows emit deterministic inferred attribution markers (0.5 confidence + deterministic fallback tool span).

userStories.title: Coverage/label delivery and confidence rendering
userStories.description: Expose causal confidence and degraded coverage posture in buyer-facing evidence and UI contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Tracer/evidence outputs include deterministic confidence provenance markers
Coverage-degraded posture is rendered explicitly in delivery artifacts
No weakening of verifier fail-closed semantics
userStories.notes: Deferred in decision freeze: strict CLDD policy and UI polish follow runtime contract lanes.

metadata.status: shipped v0.2 core + causal-attribution runtime slice through CAV-US-003 (schema/verifier/runtime), with delivery lane CAV-US-004 pending
